news.t: ETFs can still compete in 'stock picker's' market, investor says
AVANTIS REACHES THREE-YEAR ANNIVERSARY, CONTINUES TO EXPAND OFFERING

holdings.infoBox: AVUS is an equity ETF with a total of 1902 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 5.46%, Apple at 5.16%, Amazon.com at 3.32%, Microsoft at 3.28%, and Micron Technology at 2.76%.

overview.description: The Avantis U.S. Equity ETF (AVUS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of US equities of all market capitalizations, with a bias toward smaller, more profitable or value companies. AVUS was launched on Sep 24, 2019 and is issued by American Century Investments.

data.title: ETFs can still compete in 'stock picker's' market, investor says
data.text: "A lot of money is moving into active ETFs, because it provides the benefits that you have from active management," Avantis Investors' CIO says.
